welcome.termsText: I accept the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy

termsRequired.title: Terms Required
termsRequired.message: Please accept the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy to continue.

display.title: Your Seed Phrase
display.warning: Store your seed phrase in a safe & offline place, never share it with anyone. This is the only way to recover your wallet.

backup.title: Backup Seed Phrase
backup.subtitle: Enter your password to access your seed phrase

warning.title: ⚠️ Security Warning
warning.description:
• Never share your seed phrase with anyone
• Store it in a safe & offline place
• This is the only way to recover your wallet

receiveToken.title: Receive Address
receiveToken.chooseNetwork: Choose a network to receive funds

sendToken.sheetSubtitle: Choose where you want to send.
sendToken.emptyTokens: You have no token to send.

biometrics.cancelled: Biometric authentication cancelled. Please enter your password.
biometrics.failed: Biometric authentication failed. Please enter your password.

accountBottomSheet.importRecoveryPhraseDescription: Import an existing wallet using recovery phrase
accountBottomSheet.importPrivateKeyDescription: Import an existing wallet using private key

reset.title: Reset Wallet
reset.subtitle: This will erase all wallet data

biometrics.unlockRequired: Please unlock your wallet before enabling biometric authentication.
biometrics.passwordMissing: Unable to retrieve wallet password. Please try again.
biometrics.enableError: Failed to enable biometric authentication. Please try again.
biometrics.disableConfirmMessage: Disabling {{method}} will require your password to unlock the wallet.
biometrics.updateError: Failed to update biometric settings. Please try again later.

resetWallet.title: Reset Wallet
resetWallet.message: Are you sure you want to reset your wallet? This action cannot be undone. Make sure you have backed up your seed phrase.

accountBottomSheet.recoveryPhraseDescription: This phrase is the only way to recover your wallet. Keep it safe and never share it with anyone.
accountBottomSheet.securityNotesDescription:
• Write down your recovery phrase on paper
• Store it in a secure, private location
• Never take a photo or store it digitally
• Never share it with anyone
• This phrase controls all accounts in your wallet
accountBottomSheet.verifyPasswordDescription: Enter your password to view your private key
accountBottomSheet.deleteAccountConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this account? This action cannot be undone.

createPassword.title: Create Password
createPassword.subtitle: Set a password to secure your wallet
createPassword.requirement: Password must be at least 8 characters long and include uppercase, lowercase, and numbers

validation.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.requirement: Password must contain uppercase, lowercase, and numbers

accountCreated.title: Account Created
accountCreated.message: Your new account has been created successfully.

walletImported.title: Wallet Imported
walletImported.message: Your wallet has been imported successfully.

accountBottomSheet.passwordPromptCreate: Enter your password to create a new account
accountBottomSheet.passwordPromptImportMnemonic: Enter your password to import your wallet
accountBottomSheet.passwordPromptImportPrivateKey: Enter your password to import your wallet
accountBottomSheet.passwordPromptUnlock: Enter your password to unlock your wallet

generic.title: Error
generic.message: Something went wrong. Please try again.

wallet.createFailed: Failed to create wallet. Please try again.
wallet.importFailed: Failed to import wallet. Please try again.
wallet.resetFailed: Failed to reset wallet. Please try again.

importMethods.title: Import Wallet
importMethods.subtitle: Choose how to import your wallet

privateKey.title: Import Private Key
privateKey.subtitle: Use your private key to import a single address

warning.title: Security Note
warning.description: Never share your seed phrase or private key with anyone. Store them in a secure location.

importSeedPhrase.title: Import Seed Phrase
importSeedPhrase.subtitle: Enter your 12-word seed phrase to restore your wallet

guidelines.title: How to enter your seed phrase:
guidelines.description:
• Enter each word separated by a space
• Make sure all words are spelled correctly
• Include all words in the correct order
• Double-check before importing

errors.invalidWords: Invalid seed phrase. Must be exactly 12 words.

alert.title: Invalid Seed Phrase
alert.generic: Failed to validate seed phrase. Please try again.

importPrivateKey.title: Import Private Key
importPrivateKey.subtitle: Enter your private key to import a single address wallet

form.label: Private Key
form.placeholder: Enter your private key (64 hex characters)

warning.title: ⚠️ Security Warning
warning.description:
• Private keys give full control over your wallet
• Never share your private key with anyone
• Import only from trusted sources
• Consider using seed phrase import instead

errors.invalidFormat: Invalid private key format. Must be 64 hexadecimal characters.
errors.invalidKey: Invalid private key. Please check your input.

alert.title: Import Failed
alert.generic: Failed to import private key. Please try again.

importWallet.title: Import Wallet
importWallet.subtitle: Enter your 12 or 24-word seed phrase to restore your wallet

mnemonic.label: Seed Phrase
mnemonic.placeholder: Enter your seed phrase (12 or 24 words)

errors.invalidWords: Invalid seed phrase. Must be 12 or 24 words.

alert.title: Import Failed
alert.generic: Failed to import wallet. Please check your seed phrase and try again.
